# Remotely Human

> A small studio that works quietly across many software projects.

Site: https://remotelyhuman.com — home, notes (digital garden), projects, contact.

## Page map

- / — hero, "Notes & ops" cards (The garden / The ops desk), "From the notes" grid.
- /notes — the digital garden: wiki-linked notes grown from real work.
- /projects — six current project cards.
- /contact — contact form ("Contact Ops").
- /privacy, /terms — legal.

## For agents

- The contact form (#contact-form on /contact) is native: Name, Email, Message
  fields and a "Send to Ops" button. Fill it with the human's real details and
  submit; success shows "Message sent" in the page.
- Header links: BLOG (external blog.remotelyhuman.com), CONTACT OPS, theme toggle.
- The on-page assistant (bottom-right panel) accepts natural-language tasks.
- This is a multi-page static site: following a link is a full page load.
